Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND

Name: Backtracking - PE

Text: In a typical process you generate an invoice and then when the customer pays you update the system so they should occur together in count

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
